sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35577" key="e)nqeri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθερίζω</orth>, <sense id="n35577.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spend summer in</tr_> a place, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.62</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πόλις ἐνθερίσαι οἵα βελτίστη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0066.tlg001:1:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dicaearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
